task_goal: Improve repeatable handling of report export drops a required section when one field is empty: A generated report omits a required summary section when one optional source field is blank, producing an incomplete deliverable.

failures: Issue was not reproducible before the fix
Fix was not verified after the change
Change scope exceeded the allowed boundary
Fix does not match the stated root cause

decision.reason: Rollback because one or more hard checks failed

notes.winner_pattern: A conditional render may be tied to an optional field instead of the section requirement itself
notes.loser_pattern: A naive fallback could duplicate the section or alter report ordering
